Run a self-evaluation. Pull signals once, identify top 3 issues, propose changes, then file_write REPORT.MD and notify_parent — in that exact order. NO MORE THAN 4 ADDITIONAL FILE READS. Stop gathering at turn 7.

Round 2 self-evaluation. Five bugs were fixed since round 1 (DeepSeek adapter mismatch in _compact_messages, runner idle-write on exception, planning model swap, CONFIG.yaml drift header, DAG context reference-data banner). Pull fresh signals once, then identify whether any HIGH or MEDIUM issues remain. If signals look clean, write a short round-2 entry saying so. STOP gathering at turn 7 — do not investigate beyond what get_recent_signals + a quick read of REPORT.MD show. Then file_write REPORT.MD with round 2 ABOVE round 1 (preserve round 1 verbatim). Then notify_parent with 3-line summary.
